mega_challenges.name: Climate Change
mega_challenges.description: Addressing the global challenge of climate change and its impacts on Earth and beyond

mega_challenges.name: Mass Extinction
mega_challenges.description: Confronting the crisis of accelerating species loss and biodiversity collapse

mega_challenges.name: Ecosystems Collapses
mega_challenges.description: Preventing and reversing the breakdown of critical ecological systems

mega_challenges.name: Displacement
mega_challenges.description: Managing and mitigating forced migration due to environmental and social pressures

mega_challenges.name: Unrest
mega_challenges.description: Addressing social, political, and economic instability and conflict

mega_challenges.name: Explosive Impact
mega_challenges.description: Preparing for and responding to catastrophic events and system shocks

metadata.note: These are six interconnected MegaChallenges that exist simultaneously and influence one another continuously. No numerical order or ranking implied.
